---
format:
  live-revealjs:
    theme: simple
    embed-resources: true
title: Grandile, un territoire aux multiples facettes
author: Cefiloup
date: today
date-format: DD/MM/YYYY
engine: knitr
resources:
  - "donnees"
webr:
  render-df: gt-interactive
  packages:
    - dplyr
    - ggplot2
  resources:
    - donnees/grandile.rds
  cell-options:
    autorun: true
    fig-width: 11
    fig-height: 5
---

{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}


```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: packdata

library('dplyr')
library('ggplot2')

grandile <- readRDS('donnees/grandile.rds') 

```

## Description des données

**Grandile** comporte `r nrow(grandile)` individus, caractérisés par `r ncol(grandile)` variables.

## Les variables

```{webr}
grandile <- readRDS('donnees/grandile.rds') 
colnames(grandile)
```

## Indicateurs statistiques
```{webr}
summary(grandile)
```

## Distribution des revenus selon la PCS

```{webr}
#| label: rev_pcs
graph_revenusPCS <- grandile %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = pcs, y = REVENU, fill = pcs)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "grey20", size = 0.5)
graph_revenusPCS
```

## Modèle linéaire
```{webr}
fit = lm(REVENU ~ PATRIMOINE, data = grandile)
summary(fit)
plot(fit)
```

## Extrait de table
```{webr}
#| label: tbl-grandile
#| tbl-cap: Revenus à Grandile
tab <- grandile %>% 
  select(IDENT, MODCOHA, pcs, REVENU)
tab
```

## Scrollable output

```{webr}
mod <- lm(mpg ~ cyl, data = mtcars)
plot(mod)
summary(mod)
```

## Read Only

```{webr}
#| edit: false
mod <- lm(mpg ~ cyl, data = mtcars)
summary(mod)
```

## Exercises

```{webr}
#| exercise: ex1
#| caption: Exercise 1
1 + 2 + 3 + ______
```

```{webr}
#| exercise: ex1
#| check: true
if (.result == 10) {
  list(message = "Great work!", correct = TRUE)
} else {
  list(message = "That's incorrect.", correct = FALSE)
}
```

::: { .hint exercise="ex1" }

You should make the expression sum to 10.

:::

::: { .solution exercise="ex1" }

**Solution:**

```r
1 + 2 + 3 + 4
```

:::
